tooltip_12_E31F2C80494C0F9A87B2FCB22710F.SourceString:
> Activates after killing an enemy: 

<D>BISON</>
> <C>50%</> increased weapon accuracy, <C>25%</> increased speed + dexterity,  for <C>5 s</> on receiving direct vitals damage, <C>10 s</> cooldown

<D>HYDRA</>
> Gain an Adrenal Feedback stack every <C>20 s</>, stacking up to <C>5</> times

<D>DRAGON</>
> Backdraft + Ground Slam deal <C>25%</> increased fire damage + apply combust

<D>RHINO</>
> Shockwave gains <C>50%</> increased debuff duration, increased knockback force, applies stun + cripple

<D>GHOST</>
>Hip firing supressed firearms, throwing devices + interactions no longer deactivate camouflage
